_comment: IMPORTANT: For frame-skipping inference at 2-3 FPS, use stream2 (sub-stream).
This reduces bandwidth from ~4 Mbps to ~512 Kbps per camera.
Tapo Setup: Tapo App → Camera Settings → Advanced → Device Account
Set a username/password to enable RTSP access.
VIGI Setup: VIGI App or NVR → Network → RTSP (enabled by default).

cameras.name: Test Camera (Tapo C110)
cameras.notes: Tapo C110 — sub-stream (stream2) for inference at 2 FPS

cameras.name: Front Gate (VIGI C540-W)
cameras.notes: Pan/Tilt — set home position facing gate before locking

cameras.name: Storage Shed (Tapo C210)
cameras.notes: Indoor camera — fire/smoke detection primary zone

cameras.name: Pond Area (VIGI C540-W)
cameras.location: Overlooking pond — zero tolerance safety zone
cameras.notes: CRITICAL: Higher FPS (3.0) for child safety. Pan/Tilt locked on pond.

cameras.name: East Perimeter (Tapo Outdoor)
cameras.notes: Outdoor rated IP66 — starlight sensor for night detection

cameras.name: Snake Zone Alpha (VIGI C540-W)
cameras.location: Rocky area near south boundary — snake/scorpion zone
cameras.notes: Low mounting position (~1m) for ground-level hazard detection

cameras.name: Cattle Pen (Tapo C210)
cameras.location: Cattle holding area — livestock containment monitoring
cameras.notes: Livestock containment zone — alert if cow detected outside polygon

cameras.name: Pasture NW (Tapo Outdoor)
cameras.notes: Wide angle — covers pasture edge for cow escape detection

cameras.name: Farmhouse (VIGI C540-W)
cameras.notes: Pan/Tilt — covers front approach and parking area
